notes: Valheim Data — Armor Set card now lists the actual mechanical bonuses each set gives, sourced live from the game via MegaDataExtractor v1.5.0. Examples: Sneaky = +15 Sneak skill; Ask's Endurance = Run stamina drain -10%, Jump stamina cost -10%, Attack stamina cost -20%; Berserk = Health regen +30%, Stamina regen +15%.
